channel.title: notchtc on chtc
channel.description: Recent content in notchtc on chtc

item.title: home
item.description: I am chtc and I'm a dumbass from Poland. I like to listen to "normal" stuff and stuff that makes your ears bleed. I rarely play games and for some reason I want to CBT be done on me by the games. Go to other pages for more interesting stuff. Email GitHub YouTube Twitter Discord Telegram Last.fm AniList Bandcamp PGP Key (AB80 87BF 8782 B459 ECF8 A1E4 D65C E53E 8710 1757) <-- Webring's site -->
